overall.description: First-person exploration of an ancient Greek residence interior in a video game, featuring stone columns, terracotta walls, mosaic floors, and progression from entry halls through residential quarters to a grand treasure chamber with monumental statues.

scene_state.functional_zone: entry hall and corridor of ancient Greek residence

events.description: moving from the entry room into the sunlit corridor
turning left to follow the corridor path

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone corridors and examining the architectural details

entered.detail: dark stone table with ornate legs in the entry room
tall stone columns supporting the ceiling
intricate geometric tile pattern in earth tones
warm orange-brown plaster walls with decorative gold trim
window with wooden slats allowing filtered light
large terracotta vessels for storage
sturdy wooden storage chest with metal fittings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a stone-columned room with a central table, then moves through a doorway into a sunlit corridor with mosaic floors. The camera turns left and proceeds down the hallway past terracotta walls and storage vessels.

scene_state.functional_zone: side chamber with floor cushions and decorative door

events.description: entering the cushion room from the main corridor
turning to examine the room's furnishings and decorative door

agents.ego_description: examining the furnished side room with cushions and storage vessels

entered.detail: imposing dark wooden door with ornate gold trim and patterns
scattered red and orange pillows and mats on the floor
round woven basket near the cushions
low wooden cabinet with marble top surface

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a side chamber featuring a large decorated wooden door, red floor cushions, and terracotta storage vessels. The room has ornate wall trim and a woven basket near the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: bedroom area with sleeping cushions and scroll cabinets

events.description: entering the darker bedroom area from the corridor
moving from dim interior toward a darker doorway

agents.ego_description: moving through the residential quarters and examining furniture with scrolls

entered.detail: sleeping mats with pillows arranged on the floor
long wooden table with marble top holding scrolls
rolled papyrus scrolls stacked on the sideboard
decorative wooden lattice room dividers
shelves holding numerous rolled scrolls

segments.scene_description: The segment explores a bedroom area with bedrolls and floor cushions, featuring a wooden sideboard holding scrolls and terracotta vessels. The lighting is dimmer here, creating a more intimate atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: archive room and grand treasure hall with monumental statues

events.description: entering the scroll archive room from the corridor
entering the grand hall with monumental statues
stopping to examine the decorated treasure chest

agents.ego_description: examining the stone tablet on the desk, then proceeding to the treasure hall and approaching the decorated chest

entered.detail: wooden work table with scattered scrolls and writing materials
stone slab with carved inscriptions lying on the desk
stacks of rolled scrolls on the floor and furniture
monumental carved figures flanking the entrance to the treasure area
ornate chest with gold Medusa head decoration and sun motifs
gilded table holding vessels in front of the chest

segments.scene_description: The final segment begins in an archive room with a wooden desk holding a stone tablet and scattered scrolls. The camera then moves to a grand hall flanked by two massive stone statues, approaching an ornate treasure chest on a blue carpet.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an ancient Greek residence, transitioning from bright, open corridors into intimate living quarters and finally into a grand ceremonial hall. It begins in a stone-columned room with a central table, moving through a doorway into a sunlit corridor where the camera glides past terracotta walls and mosaic floors. As the camera turns into a side chamber, the environment shifts toward a domestic space filled with red floor cushions, woven baskets, and ornate wall trim. The scene then drifts into a dimmer bedroom area featuring bedrolls and a sideboard of scrolls before proceeding into an archive room with a stone tablet and wooden desk. Finally, the space opens up into a grand hall flanked by two massive stone statues, where the camera approaches an ornate treasure chest resting on a blue carpet.
